_comment: Source: Screenshot_20260421-071817.png. English UI. Bottom of the rank list (rows 2-10). The CRITICAL fixture for the position-fill cross-check fix: this screenshot has 'pYWJI slLo' (English engine's mistransliteration of ملك الظلام) at rank-8's damage AND a clean 'Numb Little Bug' at rank-9's damage. The Arabic fallback's position-fill previously assigned ملك الظلام to BOTH rows; the cross-check guard must skip the second assignment because that fid is already cleanly captured in this image's row set.
